overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring an NCPD officer character walking through a futuristic urban environment with palm-lined streets. The character passes various pedestrians and a military truck before crossing a street intersection in a sunlit, high-density commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to concrete retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following an NPC in a pink tank top

notable_agents.action: person in pink tank top walking ahead then exiting to the right behind the wall

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall with visible cracks and weathering
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
tall glass and steel futuristic buildings dominating the skyline
lower buildings with traditional architecture mixed with futuristic elements
multi-lane city street with red curbs

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following an NCPD officer walking along a sidewalk next to a tall concrete retaining wall. Palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers are visible in the distance against a clear midday sky. The character follows an NPC in a pink tank top who eventually exits to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk with white railing overlooking street

events.description: two pedestrians walk past the camera in the opposite direction
large military truck drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: person with green hair and purple pants walking in the opposite direction
military truck driving down the street from left to right

entered.detail: white painted concrete railing with vertical balusters replacing the solid wall
zebra crossing stripes visible at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a sidewalk now bordered by a white concrete railing. Two pedestrians pass by walking in the opposite direction. A large military truck drives past on the street to the left. The environment opens up slightly as the character approaches a crosswalk intersection.

events.description: character turns left and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, turning slightly left while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red coat crossing the street ahead of the character
person in orange jacket crossing from right to left

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
open street intersection with multiple crossing paths

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the street, turning slightly left. The white railing and sidewalk recede as the character enters the open intersection. Other pedestrians are also crossing, including a person in a red coat ahead and another in an orange jacket crossing from the right. The futuristic skyline remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind an NCPD officer as they transition from a narrow sidewalk corridor into a wide, sunlit urban intersection. It begins with the character walking alongside a tall concrete retaining wall, following a pedestrian in a pink tank top toward a distant skyline of futuristic skyscrapers. As the path continues, the wall shifts into a white concrete railing and the environment opens up, punctuated by the passage of two pedestrians and a large military truck driving by on the left. The scene then expands further as the character steps off the sidewalk and onto a crosswalk, moving away from the railing and into the open street. Finally, the camera follows the officer across the intersection among other pedestrians in red and orange clothing, with the high-density city skyline looming in the background.
